ingredients:
1 can chickpeas
2 tbsp vegan mayo
1 celery stalk, diced
1 tbsp dill
Salt and pepper
Bread or toast
instructions:
Mash the chickpeas.
Mix with the rest of the ingredients.
Serve on toasted bread.

ingredients:
1 cup cooked quinoa
2 cups mixed vegetables
1 block tofu
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp garlic
1 tsp sesame oil
instructions:
Cook quinoa.
Sauté veggies and tofu.
Add quinoa and sauce.
Stir until hot.
notes: Use tamari instead of soy sauce for gluten-free.

ingredients:
8 oz pasta
2 ripe avocados
2 garlic cloves
2 tbsp lemon juice
Fresh basil
Salt and pepper
instructions:
Blend avocado, garlic, lemon, basil, salt, and pepper.
Toss with warm pasta.
